title: oenothera andina var. hilgardii
intro: Oenothera andina var. hilgardii, also known as Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant native to the Andes mountains, characterized by its delicate white or yellow flowers and medicinal properties. This plant is rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The medicinal properties of Oenothera andina var. hilgardii include reducing symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, as well as alleviating skin conditions like eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and moisturizing properties. Herbal preparations of Oenothera andina var. hilgardii can be found in the form of capsules, oils, and teas, and are used to support overall health and well-being.
